evidence.comparison_goal: Minimize context cost while preserving downstream utility and evidence accuracy.

do_not: Do not invent memory IDs or hashes.
Do not promote tombstoned, stale, or poisoned records.
Do not assume a signed record is semantically valid.
Do not claim perfect recall or unbounded memory.
instructions: Choose the strategy that meets utility and evidence thresholds at lower token cost than full history.

rejected_strategies: latest_only: fails task_score threshold (0.4 < 0.95) and evidence_accuracy threshold (0.35 < 0.95)
summary_only: fails task_score threshold (0.86 < 0.95) and evidence_accuracy threshold (0.82 < 0.95)
